mapper.sql: id, user_id, gym_id, title, description, grade, gcs_path, gcs_streaming_path, thumbnail_path, duration_seconds, file_size_bytes, mime_type, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, is_public, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO videos (user_id, gym_id, title, description, grade, gcs_path, gcs_streaming_path, thumbnail_path, duration_seconds, file_size_bytes, mime_type, status, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{gymId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{grade}, #{gcsPath}, #{gcsStreamingPath}, #{thumbnailPath}, #{durationSeconds}, #{fileSizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{status}, #{isPublic})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM videos WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE is_public = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status <> 'failed'
AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM videos WHERE is_public = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status <> 'failed' AND gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.update: UPDATE videos SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET comment_count = GREATEST(0, comment_count - 1) WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE videos
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, grade = #{grade}, is_public = #{isPublic}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE videos SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE videos SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
